summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mystery Globe UFO Search Agent. Backend APIs working excellently with one minor bug fixed. Frontend 3D globe, interactive panels, AI chat, and video integration all functioning perfectly.

fixed_bugs.issue: POST request failed with 500 error due to duplicate 'reported_by' parameter
fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Fixed parameter conflict in create_sighting function

performance_notes.issue: Some WebGL performance warnings in console during globe rendering

passed_tests: Get sightings by type (UFO: 4, UAP: 2, Anomaly: 2)
Get satellites (6 satellites with live positions)
AI Chat functionality with OpenAI GPT-5.2 and location extraction
Floating panels with proper data display
Report sighting form with all fields
Video bar with 6 YouTube video cards
Interactive globe points for sightings and satellites
Glassmorphism UI design with starfield background
